description: Unit test suite for the Alert component, testing its instantiation, behavior, and integration with jQuery mock.

methods.name: describe
methods.description: Defines a test suite for the Alert component.

methods.name: beforeAll
methods.description: Sets up the fixture element before all tests.

methods.name: afterEach
methods.description: Clears the fixture after each test.

methods.name: it
methods.description: Defines individual test cases for Alert behavior.

methods.name: new Promise
methods.description: Handles asynchronous test cases involving alert closing.

methods.name: alert.close
methods.description: Method to trigger alert close behavior.

methods.name: alert.dispose
methods.description: Method to dispose of the alert instance.

methods.name: Alert.getInstance
methods.description: Retrieves existing Alert instance associated with a DOM element.

methods.name: Alert.getOrCreateInstance
methods.description: Retrieves or creates an Alert instance for a DOM element.
